description: User scrolls down through the list of available flights from Melbourne to Adelaide to compare options.
page_title: Flight Centre | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: Search results page showing various flight options from MEL to ADL with filters on the left.

description: User hovers over the Virgin Australia flight departing at 12:10pm.
page_title: Flight Centre | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the flight card for the 12:10pm Virgin Australia flight.

description: User clicks to expand the flight details for the 12:10pm Virgin Australia flight.
page_title: Flight Centre | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The user activates the expansion of the flight card to see fare options.

description: The flight card expands to show different fare types: Lite, Choice, and Flex.
page_title: Flight Centre | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The UI updates to reveal the 'Select Returning Fare Type' section within the flight card.

description: User hovers over the SELECT button for the Lite fare option.
page_title: Flight Centre | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The cursor lingers over the first fare option labeled 'Lite' for $177.

description: User selects the Lite fare option for $177.
page_title: Flight Centre | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The user clicks the blue SELECT button under the Lite fare column.

description: The SELECT button updates to a green SELECTED state with a checkmark.
page_title: Flight Centre | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: Visual feedback confirms the fare selection with a green checkmark icon.

description: An 'All Set!' loading overlay appears, followed by a transition to the 'Review trip' page.
page_title: Flight Centre | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: A white loading overlay with a spinner and the text 'All Set! Now let's review your flight selections' covers the screen.

description: Page navigates to the Review Trip screen.
page_title: Flight Centre | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The loading overlay disappears, revealing the 'Review trip' page content.

description: The price summary sidebar loads on the right side of the page.
page_title: Flight Centre | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The 'Price summary' box appears on the right, showing the total cost of $333.95.

description: User scrolls down the Review Trip page to check flight details and add-ons like baggage and seats.
page_title: Flight Centre | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: User moves down the page past the flight summaries into the 'Add-ons' section.

description: User hovers over the SELECT button for the Online Captain's Pack.
page_title: Flight Centre | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the selection button for the $9.95 Captain's Pack add-on.

description: User clicks to add the Online Captain's Pack for $9.95.
page_title: Flight Centre | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The user clicks the blue SELECT button to include the Captain's Pack in their booking.

description: The Captain's Pack button updates to SELECTED.
page_title: Flight Centre | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The button text changes to 'SELECTED' and the background color updates.

description: User scrolls to the bottom of the page to find the final confirmation button.
page_title: Flight Centre | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: User scrolls past the Captain's Pack section to the very bottom of the review page.

description: User hovers over the green CONTINUE button at the bottom of the page.
page_title: Flight Centre | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The cursor is placed over the large green 'CONTINUE' button.

description: User clicks the CONTINUE button to proceed to traveller details.
page_title: Flight Centre | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The user clicks the button to move to the next step of the booking flow.

description: A 'Thanks for confirming your flights' loading overlay appears with a spinner.
page_title: Flight Centre | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: A white loading screen with a spinner and the text 'Thanks for confirming your flights. Next up, your traveller details...' is displayed.

description: Page navigates to the Travellers details entry page.
page_title: Flight Centre | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The URL changes and the 'Travellers' page begins to render.

description: The Travellers page loads its content, including the form for Adult 1.
page_title: Flight Centre | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The form fields for Title, First name, Last name, and Date of birth appear on the screen.

description: A full-screen overlay from the usability testing tool appears asking 'What's making you hesitate there?'.
page_title: Flight Centre | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: A dark, semi-transparent overlay with a question from the testing platform covers the entire browser window.
